steps.title: Identify the core perceptual principle
steps.content: People perceive sounds they believe are meaningful as quieter than equally loud noise.

steps.title: Apply the principle to the sounds
steps.content: The participant would perceive the nature sounds as louder than “Whole Lotta Love” despite their equal volume. The other options either treat this as a measurement mistake (A), assume an unjustified adjustment (B), or attribute meaning to noise (C). That matches choice D — D is correct.
